member.name: T:Modulus.Bundled.Processors.CacheLoaderProcessor
member.summary:
Loads cache bytes from a named store and writes them to the pipeline context.
The processor is self-describing: it reads its own Manifest.Provides[0] to determine which context tag to populate. A matching CacheConfig entry (from context["cache-config"]) provides the store and cache name.
Pipeline example: Manifest.provides = ["dep-graph"] CacheConfig entry: OutputTag="dep-graph", CacheName="dependency-graph", CacheStore=... → context["dep-graph"] = raw bytes (byte[]) → context["dep-graph.metadata"] = CacheMetadata (if found)
If Manifest is null, Provides is empty, or no matching CacheConfig is found, the processor passes context through unchanged and returns success.

member.name: M:Modulus.Bundled.Processors.CacheLoaderProcessor.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Modulus.Bundled.Processors.CacheLoaderProcessor})
member.summary: Creates a new cache loader processor.
member.param: Optional logger for cache loading diagnostics.

member.name: T:Modulus.Bundled.Processors.CacheSaverProcessor
member.summary:
Saves a context value to a named cache store.
The processor is self-describing: it reads its own Manifest.Requires[0] to determine which context tag to persist. A matching CacheConfig entry (from context["cache-config"]) provides the store and cache name.
Pipeline example: Manifest.requires = ["dep-graph"] CacheConfig entry: OutputTag="dep-graph", CacheName="dependency-graph", CacheStore=... → reads context["dep-graph"] (byte[], string, or any JSON-serialisable object) → reads context["dep-graph.metadata"] (CacheMetadata, optional) → persists both to the store
If Manifest is null, Requires is empty, no matching CacheConfig is found, or the context tag has no value, the processor passes context through unchanged and returns success. A failed save does not fail the pipeline — it is returned as a warning.

member.name: M:Modulus.Bundled.Processors.CacheSaverProcessor.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Modulus.Bundled.Processors.CacheSaverProcessor})
member.summary: Creates a new cache saver processor.
member.param: Optional logger for cache saving diagnostics.

member.name: T:Modulus.Storage.Cache.CacheConfig
P:Modulus.Storage.Cache.CacheConfig.OutputTag
member.summary: The pipeline context key this entry maps to. For CacheLoaderProcessor: must match Manifest.Provides[0]. For CacheSaverProcessor: must match Manifest.Requires[0].

member.name: P:Modulus.Storage.Cache.CacheConfig.CacheName
member.summary: The cache name passed to ICacheStore.LoadAsync / SaveAsync. Typically a stable identifier like "dependency-graph".

member.name: P:Modulus.Storage.Cache.CacheConfig.CacheStore
member.summary: The store to read from / write to.

member.name: P:Modulus.Storage.Cache.CacheConfig.ValueType
member.summary: Gets the type of data - either byte[] or a JSON-serialisable type - that the cache processors should expect for this tag.

member.name: P:Modulus.Storage.Cache.CacheConfig.RequireTransformedMarker
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether a transformed marker is required.

member.name: T:Modulus.Storage.Cache.CacheContextKeys
member.summary: Well-known context keys used by CacheLoaderProcessor and CacheSaverProcessor.

member.name: F:Modulus.Storage.Cache.CacheContextKeys.CacheConfig
member.summary: InitialContext key that holds the List<CacheConfig>.

member.name: T:Modulus.Storage.Cache.CacheMetadata
member.summary: Metadata for tracking file changes in cached builds. Used for incremental builds - tracks which files have changed since last cache.

member.name: P:Modulus.Storage.Cache.CacheMetadata.LastModified
member.summary: When this cache was last modified.

member.name: P:Modulus.Storage.Cache.CacheMetadata.FileSizes
member.summary: File size mapping for quick change detection. Used to detect which files have changed since cache was built.

member.name: P:Modulus.Storage.Cache.CacheMetadata.FileTimestamps
member.summary: File path to last modified timestamp mapping. Quick check before computing expensive hash - if timestamp unchanged, file likely unchanged.

member.name: T:Modulus.Storage.Cache.ICacheStore
member.summary: Cache-specific extension of IDataStore that adds metadata tracking. Metadata enables incremental builds by tracking file changes (hashes, timestamps).

member.name: M:Modulus.Storage.Cache.ICacheStore.LoadMetadataAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Load cache metadata (timestamps, hashes for incremental builds).
member.returns: Metadata, or null if not found

member.name: M:Modulus.Storage.Cache.ICacheStore.SaveMetadataAsync(System.String,Modulus.Storage.Cache.CacheMetadata)
member.summary: Save cache metadata.

member.name: T:Modulus.Storage.FileCacheStore
member.summary:
File-based cache storage implementation. Stores cache data and metadata in the file system.
File structure: {basePath}/ ├── {cacheType}/ │ ├── cache.bin (cache data as bytes) │ └── metadata.json (timestamps, hashes)

member.name: M:Modulus.Storage.FileCacheStore.#ctor(System.String,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Modulus.Storage.FileCacheStore})
member.summary: Creates a new file-based cache store.

member.name: T:Modulus.Storage.GzippedCacheStore
member.summary:
Decorator for ICacheStore that adds gzip compression/decompression. Uses decorator pattern - wraps any ICacheStore implementation and transparently compresses data.
Examples: - GzippedCacheStore(FileCacheStore) → Gzipped files on disk - GzippedCacheStore(MemoryCacheStore) → Gzipped data in memory - EncryptedCacheStore(GzippedCacheStore(FileCacheStore)) → Encrypted + gzipped files

member.name: M:Modulus.Storage.GzippedCacheStore.#ctor(Modulus.Storage.Cache.ICacheStore,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Modulus.Storage.GzippedCacheStore})
member.summary: Creates a new gzipped cache store that wraps an inner store.
member.param: The inner cache store to wrap (e.g., FileCacheStore, MemoryCacheStore)

member.name: T:Modulus.Storage.HybridCacheStore
member.summary: Hybrid (memory + file) cache storage implementation. Combines fast in-memory access with file-based persistence for durability. Memory cache is checked first on reads; file-based fallback is used on a miss. Writes go to both layers simultaneously. Useful for CI builds and ephemeral environments where speed and persistence both matter. Thread-safe implementation using lock for concurrent access.

member.name: M:Modulus.Storage.HybridCacheStore.#ctor(System.String,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Modulus.Storage.HybridCacheStore})
member.summary: Creates a new hybrid (memory + file) cache store.
member.param: Base directory path where file cache entries are stored.
Optional logger for cache diagnostics (useful for debugging, usually null for testing)

member.name: M:Modulus.Storage.HybridCacheStore.Clear
member.summary: Clears all cached data and metadata. Useful for test cleanup between test runs.

member.name: P:Modulus.Storage.HybridCacheStore.Count
member.summary: Gets the total number of cached entries. Useful for test assertions and debugging.

member.name: M:Modulus.Storage.HybridCacheStore.GetCacheTypes
member.summary: Gets all cache type names currently stored. Useful for test assertions and debugging.

member.name: T:Modulus.Storage.MemoryCacheStore
member.summary: In-memory cache storage implementation. Useful for testing and scenarios where disk I/O should be avoided (CI builds, ephemeral environments). Thread-safe implementation using lock for concurrent access.

member.name: M:Modulus.Storage.MemoryCacheStore.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Modulus.Storage.MemoryCacheStore})
member.summary: Creates a new in-memory cache store.
member.param: Optional logger for cache diagnostics (useful for debugging, usually null for testing)

member.name: M:Modulus.Storage.MemoryCacheStore.Clear
member.summary: Clears all cached data and metadata. Useful for test cleanup between test runs.

member.name: P:Modulus.Storage.MemoryCacheStore.Count
member.summary: Gets the total number of cached entries. Useful for test assertions and debugging.

member.name: M:Modulus.Storage.MemoryCacheStore.GetCacheTypes
member.summary: Gets all cache type names currently stored. Useful for test assertions and debugging.

member.name: T:Modulus.Storage.RawCacheStore
member.summary:
Human-readable cache store. Writes data as plain files rather than opaque cache.bin blobs.
File layout (flat — no subdirectories): {basePath}/{key}.json — objects and collections (pretty-printed JSON) {basePath}/{key} — raw byte[] data; key must include the extension (e.g. "dashboard.html")
LoadAsync returns byte[] in both cases. CacheLoaderProcessor deserializes via ValueType as normal. SaveMetadataAsync / LoadMetadataAsync are no-ops — files are their own documentation.
When to use: - Data that humans need to read directly (governance ledger, entropy history, dashboard HTML) - Files that are committed to a hub repo and served or reviewed outside the pipeline
Future: IRawCacheStore : IDataStore can add richer metadata without duplicating CacheConfig.

member.name: M:Modulus.Storage.RawCacheStore.#ctor(System.String,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Modulus.Storage.RawCacheStore})
member.summary: Creates a raw (human-readable) cache store.

member.name: M:Modulus.Storage.RawCacheStore.LoadAsync(System.String)
member.remarks: Tries {key} first (raw bytes), then {key}.json. Returns byte[] either way so CacheLoaderProcessor can deserialize via ValueType as normal.

member.name: M:Modulus.Storage.RawCacheStore.SaveAsync(System.String,System.Object)
member.remarks: byte[] → written to {key} (extension must be in the key, e.g. "dashboard.html"). All other types → pretty-printed JSON to {key}.json.

member.name: M:Modulus.Storage.RawCacheStore.LoadMetadataAsync(System.String)
member.summary: No-op — raw files are self-describing. Metadata will be added via IRawCacheStore : IDataStore.

member.name: M:Modulus.Storage.RawCacheStore.SaveMetadataAsync(System.String,Modulus.Storage.Cache.CacheMetadata)
member.summary: No-op — raw files are self-describing.

member.name: T:Modulus.Storage.StorageHelpers
member.summary: Common methods for use across cache storage implementations.

member.name: M:Modulus.Storage.StorageHelpers.ToBytes(System.Object)
member.summary: Converts a cached object to a byte array. Passes through byte[] as-is; encodes strings as UTF-8; serializes everything else as JSON.
